text.rich:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Choose a friendly unit and a spell. Counter that spell and give that unit +:rb_might: equal to that spell's Energy cost this turn.
text.plain:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Choose a friendly unit and a spell. Counter that spell and give that unit +:rb_might: equal to that spell's Energy cost this turn.
